spacing_and_layout.container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden

panels.left: w-full md:w-[350px] lg:w-[400px] h-full overflow-y-auto border-r border-stone-200 bg-white p-6 flex flex-col gap-6
panels.center: flex-1 h-full flex flex-col bg-stone-50 relative
panels.right: w-full md:w-[350px] lg:w-[400px] h-full overflow-y-auto border-l border-stone-200 bg-white p-6 flex flex-col gap-6

spacing_and_layout.padding_rules: Use generous padding inside panels (p-6). Between sections use gap-8. For list items use p-4.

components.strategy: Use Shadcn UI with customized rounded corners (rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for buttons). Clean, minimal borders. No heavy shadows, use 1px solid strokes or subtle shadow-sm.

design_features.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this data-heavy app. Use solid flat surfaces with crisp borders.
design_features.neumorphism: Use on KPI summary cards top of map (bg-white, shadow-sm, border border-stone-100).
design_features.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Preferred Phosphor for an earthy, high-end feel.
design_features.empty_state: Display a beautiful vintage map image with a prompt to paste a Google My Maps URL.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 ratio. Orange-600 on white is accessible. Stone-500 on white is accessible.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid in kebab-case based on role (e.g. data-testid='generate-route-button').

instructions_to_main_agent.1: The UI text MUST be in Spanish as requested by the user.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Implement a 3-column layout on desktop: Left (Settings & Data Import), Center (Map Embed & KPI Summaries), Right (Generated Itinerary).
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Fetch KML points from the Google My Maps URL (usually by appending &output=kml to the map URL). Extract placemarks, coordinates, and names.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: In the left panel, provide sliders to adjust category weights (e.g., Museum=5, Restaurant=3). These weights are crucial for the algorithm.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Implement a route optimization algorithm (can be a greedy heuristic or a simplified knapsack + TSP approach) that considers the total available hours, travel time between points (based on selected speed and straight-line/haversine distance if real routing API is unavailable), and maximizes the total value (sum of weights).
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Use the provided image for the empty state before a map URL is imported.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Provide a Save/Load functionality using MongoDB (call backend endpoints to store/retrieve itineraries).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Apply the typography using Tailwind config (Work Sans for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body).
